title: muhlenbergia fournieriana
intro: Muhlenbergia fournieriana, also known as Mexican grass or Fournier's muhly, is a type of perennial grass native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Muhlenbergia fournieriana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
